name: Do I qualify for workers comp if I slipped and fell at work in Boise Idaho?
description: Yes, slips at work qualify if reported timely; no fault required.[1][4]

mainEntity.name: Do I qualify for workers comp if I slipped and fell at work in Boise Idaho?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, slips at work qualify if reported timely; no fault required.[1][4]
acceptedAnswer.description: Yes, slip-and-fall injuries at work typically qualify under Idaho and Utah workers' comp if they arise out of and in the course of employment.[1][9] Coverage includes on-premises accidents during work hours, presumed compensable.[1] Key factors: Report within 60 days in Idaho or 180 in Utah; no fault needed—it's no-fault insurance.[3][4] Practical guidance: Tell your employer immediately, see an approved doctor, and file the First Report if they don't. Benefits cover medical care and lost wages regardless of employer fault.
